widget.name: Tableview
widget.description: Dyanamically add column and can merge the box also.

property.caption: Row
property.description: Integer attribute for row count. Defaults to 3 if not set.

property.caption: Column
property.description: Integer attribute for column count. Defaults to 3 if not set.

property.caption: Generate table result
property.description: Boolean attribute written by the On Generate Table microflow/nanoflow. Set True to allow table generation, False to block it. The widget watches this attribute after the action executes.

property.caption: Total cells
property.description: Integer attribute to store total number of cells (rows x columns).

property.caption: Blocked Cell
property.description: Integer attribute to store count of blocked cells.

property.caption: Merged cells
property.description: Integer attribute to store count of merged cell groups.

property.caption: Blank cells
property.description: Integer attribute to store count of blanked cells.

property.caption: Generate Table button
property.description: Show the Generate Table button.

property.caption: Row button (+)
property.description: Show button to add rows.

property.caption: Column button (+)
property.description: Show button to add columns.

property.caption: Enable cell editing
property.description: Allow users to edit cell content via input fields.

property.caption: Enable checkbox
property.description: Show checkbox in each cell for boolean selection.

property.caption: Enable cell merging
property.description: Allow users to merge cells horizontally and vertically.

property.caption: Enable cell blanking
property.description: Allow users to blank selected cells. Blanked cells retain data but appear invisible.

property.caption: Table data
property.description: Unlimited String attribute to store complete table data as JSON.

property.caption: Backup table data
property.description: Additional String attribute for backup storage.

property.caption: Auto save
property.description: Automatically save table state to attribute on every change.

property.caption: Environment
property.description: Static environment value (e.g., Dev, Test, Prod).

property.caption: On generate table
property.description: Microflow or nanoflow called when Generate Table is clicked. Run validation inside it, show feedback if needed, then set the Generate table result Boolean attribute to True (allow) or False (block).

property.caption: On cell click/value change
property.description: Action executed when a cell is clicked or its value changes.

property.caption: On table structure change
property.description: Action executed when the table structure changes.

property.caption: Border color
property.description: CSS color for table borders. Default: #dee2e6.

property.caption: Selected cell color
property.description: CSS background color for selected cells. Default: #cfe2ff.

property.caption: Merged cell color
property.description: CSS background color for merged cells. Default: #e3f2fd.

property.caption: Blank cell color
property.description: CSS background color for blanked cells. Default: #2c2c2c.
